<xf:if is="$xf.options.googleAnalyticsWebPropertyId">
	<link rel="dns-prefetch" href="https://www.google-analytics.com">
	<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id={$xf.options.googleAnalyticsWebPropertyId}"></script>
	<script>
		window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
		function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
		gtag('js', new Date());
		gtag('config', '{$xf.options.googleAnalyticsWebPropertyId|escape("js")}', {
			// <!--[XF:ga:config_start]-->
			<xf:if is="$xf.cookie.domain">
				'cookie_domain': '{$xf.cookie.domain}',
			</xf:if>
			<xf:if is="$xf.options.googleAnalyticsAnonymize">
				'anonymize_ip': true,
			</xf:if>
		});
	</script>
</xf:if>

<xf:macro name="default" arg-element="!">
	<xf:js src="{{ js_url('nulumia/vendor/flexslider/jquery.flexslider.js') }}" />
	<xf:js>
		// Defaults at https://github.com/woocommerce/FlexSlider/wiki/FlexSlider-Properties
		// Values here only override defaults where chosen
		$(window).on("load", function() {
			$('{$element}').flexslider({
				pauseOnHover: true,
				video: true,
				<xf:if is="{$xf.language.text_direction} == 'RTL'">
				rtl: true,
				</xf:if>
				before: function() {
					if (!canSlide)
						slider.flexslider("stop");
				}
			});

		});
	</xf:js>
</xf:macro>

<xf:macro name="custom" arg-element="!" arg-animation="fade" arg-animationSpeed="500" arg-dots="true" arg-arrows="true" arg-wait="6000" arg-autoplay="true" arg-dotsContainer="{{ null }}">
	<xf:js src="{{ js_url('nulumia/vendor/flexslider/jquery.flexslider.js') }}" />
	<xf:js>
		$(window).on("load", function() {
			$('{$element}').flexslider({
				animation: "{$animation}",
				easing: "swing",
				slideshow: {$autoplay},
				slideshowSpeed: {$wait},
				animationSpeed: {$animationSpeed},
				pauseOnAction: true,
				pauseOnHover: true,
				touch: true,
				video: true,
				controlNav: {$dots},
				directionNav: {$arrows},
				<xf:if is="$dotsContainer">
				controlsContainer: $('{$dotsContainer}'),
				</xf:if>
				<xf:if is="{$xf.language.text_direction} == 'RTL'">
				rtl: true,
				</xf:if>
				before: function() {
					if (!canSlide)
						slider.flexslider("stop");
				}
			});

		});
	</xf:js>
</xf:macro>

<xf:macro name="nl_slider">
	<xf:js src="{{ js_url('nulumia/vendor/flexslider/jquery.flexslider.js') }}" />
	<xf:js>
		$(window).on("load", function() {
			$('.flexslider').flexslider({
				slideshow: {{ property('nlSliderAutoPlay') ? 'true' : 'false' }},
				slideshowSpeed: {{ property('nlSliderAutoPlayDelay') }},
				animationSpeed: {{ property('nlSliderTransitionSpeed') }},
				pauseOnAction: true,
				pauseOnHover: true,
				touch: true,
				video: true,
				controlNav: {{ property('nlSliderUseDotControls') ? 'true' : 'false' }},
				directionNav: {{ property('nlSliderUseArrowControls') ? 'true' : 'false' }},
				<xf:if is="{$xf.language.text_direction} == 'RTL'">
				rtl: true,
				</xf:if>
				before: function() {
					if (!canSlide)
						slider.flexslider("stop");
				}
			});
		});
	</xf:js>
</xf:macro>

 // https://github.com/kenwheeler/slick/issues/359 $.fn.randomize = function(selector){ var $elems = selector ? $(this).find(selector) : $(this).children(), $parents = $elems.parent(); $parents.each(function(){ $(this).children(selector).sort(function(){ return Math.round(Math.random()) - 0.5; }).detach().appendTo(this); }); return this; }; // randomize the slides and then call slick $(".carouselList--icons").randomize(".carouselList-item");

<xf:if is="property('nlLogoGlitchEffects') == true">

.p-header-logo img:hover, .footerLogo:hover {
  animation: glitch 750ms infinite;
}

@-webkit-keyframes glitch {
  0% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
  }
  5% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(2deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(2deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(2deg);
    transform: skewX(2deg);
    opacity: 0.75;
  }
  10% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
    opacity: 1;
  }
  15% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(-5deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(-5deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(-5deg);
    transform: skewX(-5deg);
    opacity: 0.75;
  }
  20% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
    opacity: 1;
  }
  45% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(3deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(3deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(3deg);
    transform: skewX(3deg);
    opacity: 0.75;
  }
  50% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
    opacity: 1;
  }
  55% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
    opacity: 0.75;
  }
  60% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
    opacity: 1;
  }
  75% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(2deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(2deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(2deg);
    transform: skewX(2deg);
  }
  80% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
  }
  85% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(-8deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(-8deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(-8deg);
    transform: skewX(-8deg);
    opacity: 0.75;
  }
  90% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
    opacity: 1;
  }
  100% {
    -moz-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -ms-transform: skewX(0deg);
    -webkit-transform: skewX(0deg);
    transform: skewX(0deg);
  }
}
@-webkit-keyframes scan {
  0% {
    top: 0%;
  }
  50% {
    top: 97%;
  }
  100% {
    top: 0%;
  }
}
</xf:if>

<xf:if is="property('styleType') == 'light'">
@_notice-darkBg: xf-intensify(@xf-contentBg, 10%);
@_notice-lightBg: xf-diminish(@xf-contentBg, 10%);
<xf:else />
@_notice-darkBg: xf-diminish(@xf-contentBg, 10%);
@_notice-lightBg: xf-intensify(@xf-contentBg, 10%);
</xf:if>
@_notice-floatingFade: 80%;
@_notice-imageSize: 48px;
@_notice-paddingV: @xf-nlNoticePaddingV;
@_notice-paddingH: @xf-nlNoticePaddingH;

.notices
{
	.m-listPlain();

	&.notices--block
	{
		.notice
		{
			margin-bottom: ((@xf-elementSpacer) / 2);
		}
	}

	&.notices--floating
	{
		// assumed to be within u-bottomFixer
		margin: 0 20px 0 auto;
		width: 300px;
		max-width: 100%;
		z-index: @zIndex-8;

		@media (max-width: 340px)
		{
			margin-right: 10px;
		}

		.notice
		{
			margin-bottom: 20px;
		}
	}

	&.notices--scrolling
	{
		display: flex;
		align-items: stretch;
		overflow: hidden;
		.xf-blockBorder();
		margin-bottom: ((@xf-elementSpacer) / 2);

		&.notices--isMulti
		{
			margin-bottom: ((@xf-elementSpacer) / 2) + 20px;
		}

		.notice
		{
			width: 100%;
			flex-grow: 0;
			flex-shrink: 0;
			/* border: none; */
		}
	}
}

.noticeScrollContainer
{
	margin-bottom: ((@xf-elementSpacer) / 2);

	.lSSlideWrapper
	{
		// .xf-blockBorder();
		background: @xf-contentBg;
	}

	.notices.notices--scrolling
	{
		border: none;
		margin-bottom: 0;
	}
}

.notice
{
	.m-clearFix();
	position: relative;

	.xf-blockBorder();
	.xf-nlNoticeContent();

	&.notice--primary
	{
		.xf-contentHighlightBase();
		.xf-nlNoticePrimary();

		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice) {
			.xf-nlNoticePrimaryLink();
		}
		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice):hover {
			.xf-nlNoticePrimaryLinkHover();
		}
	}

	&.notice--accent
	{
		.xf-contentAccentBase();
		.xf-nlNoticeAccent();
		
		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice) {
			.xf-nlNoticeAccentLink();
		}
		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice):hover {
			.xf-nlNoticeAccentLinkHover();
		}
	}

	&.notice--dark
	{
		background: @_notice-darkBg;
		.xf-nlNoticeDark();
		
		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice) {
			.xf-nlNoticeDarkLink();
		}
		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice):hover {
			.xf-nlNoticeDarkLinkHover();
		}
	}

	&.notice--light
	{
		background: @_notice-lightBg;
		.xf-nlNoticeLight();
		
		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice) {
			.xf-nlNoticeLightLink();
		}
		a:not(.button):not(.button--notice):hover {
			.xf-nlNoticeLightLinkHover();
		}
	}

	&.notice--enablePush
	{
		display: none;

		@media (max-width: @xf-responsiveWide)
		{
			padding: @xf-paddingSmall @xf-paddingSmall @xf-paddingLarge;
			font-size: @xf-fontSizeSmall;
		}
	}

	&.notice--cookie
	{
		@media (max-width: @xf-responsiveWide)
		{
			.notice-content
			{
				padding: @xf-paddingSmall @xf-paddingSmall @xf-paddingLarge;
				font-size: @xf-fontSizeSmaller;

				.button--notice
				{
					font-size: @xf-fontSizeSmaller;
					padding: @xf-paddingSmall @xf-paddingMedium;

					.button-text
					{
						font-size: @xf-fontSizeSmaller;
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	.notices--block &
	{
		font-size: @xf-fontSizeNormal;
		border-radius: @xf-blockBorderRadius;
	}

	.notices--floating &
	{
		font-size: @xf-fontSizeSmallest;
		border-radius: @xf-borderRadiusMedium;
		box-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0, 0.25);

		&.notice--primary
		{
			// background-color: fade(@xf-contentHighlightBase--background-color, @_notice-floatingFade);
		}

		&.notice--accent
		{
			// background-color: fade(@xf-contentAccentBase--background-color, @_notice-floatingFade);
		}

		&.notice--dark
		{
			// background-color: fade(@_notice-darkBg, @_notice-floatingFade);
		}

		&.notice--light
		{
			// background-color: fade(@_notice-lightBg, @_notice-floatingFade);
		}

		.has-js &
		{
			display: none;
		}
	}

	&.notice--hasImage
	{
		.notice-content
		{
			margin-left: ((@_notice-imageSize) + (@_notice-paddingH));
			min-height: ((@_notice-imageSize) + (@_notice-paddingV) * 2);
		}
	}

	// note: visibility hidden is used by the JS to detect when responsiveness is hiding a notice

	@media (max-width: @xf-responsiveWide)
	{
		&.notice--hidewide:not(.is-vis-processed)
		{
			display: none;
			visibility: hidden;
		}
	}
	@media (max-width: @xf-responsiveMedium)
	{
		&.notice--hidemedium:not(.is-vis-processed)
		{
			display: none;
			visibility: hidden;
		}
	}
	@media (max-width: @xf-responsiveNarrow)
	{
		&.notice--hidenarrow:not(.is-vis-processed)
		{
			display: none;
			visibility: hidden;
		}
	}
}

.notice-image
{
	float: left;
	padding: @_notice-paddingV 0 @_notice-paddingH @_notice-paddingV;

	img
	{
		max-width: @_notice-imageSize;
		max-height: @_notice-imageSize;
	}
}

.notice-content
{
	padding: @_notice-paddingV @_notice-paddingH;

	a.notice-dismiss
	{
		&:before
		{
			.m-faBase();

			.m-faContent(@fa-var-times, .75em);
		}

		float: right;

		color: inherit;
		font-size: 16px;
		line-height: 1;
		height: 1em;
		box-sizing: content-box;
		padding: 0 0 5px 5px;

		opacity: .5;
		.m-transition(opacity);

		cursor: pointer;

		&:hover
		{
			text-decoration: none;
			opacity: 1;
		}

		.notices--floating &
		{
			font-size: 14px;
		}
	}
}

group.title: [Nulumia] Theme Settings
group.description: Set basic theme options, manage license keys, header & footer scripts

group.title: [Nulumia] Top Bar
group.description: Settings for the theme top bar

group.title: [Nulumia] Background Settings
group.description: Settings for custom backgrounds, video & slideshow backgrounds, floating layouts, etc

group.title: [Nulumia] Logo Icon Carousel
group.description: Display Partner, Featured or Sponsor logos in a carousel slider

group.title: [Nulumia] Header & Navigation
group.description: Settings for the top bar, text based logo, navigation & visitor tabs, etc

group.title: [Nulumia] Featured Content
group.description: Settings for the featured content slider

group.title: [Nulumia] Ticker
group.description: Settings for the CSS scrolling ticker system

group.title: [Nulumia] Slider
group.description: Add up to 10 slides in the built in slideshow feature

group.title: [Nulumia] Sidebar Settings
group.description: Settings for the sidebar

group.title: [Nulumia] Node Grid & Backgrounds
group.description: Settings for the flexible node grid, set custom node background images and more

group.title: [Nulumia] Discussion Grid
group.description: Settings for the thread & discussion grid

group.title: [Nulumia] Advanced Footer
group.description: Settings for the advanced footer. Set content for columns, rows and blocks.

group.title: [Nulumia] Social Settings
group.description: Social Media & Share settings for Nulumia themes

group.title: [Nulumia] Theme Effects & Animation
group.description: Configure various theme effects, import external Jquery libraries, etc

group.title: [Nulumia] Addon Compatibility
group.description: Contains style tweaks for various popular addons. Can help matching addon appearance to your Nulumia theme, in other cases can extend style features when not preset in the addons themselves.

group.title: [Nulumia] UX Settings
group.description: Styles for miscellaneous user interface elements, such as drop shadows, dot controls, buttons, select inputs, etc

group.title: [Nulumia] Page Layouts
group.description: (Currently Inactive) Settings for custom node based pages, page builder settings etc

group.title: Sidebar
group.description: Styles for the Xenforo sidebar and sidenav

group.title: Resource Manager
group.description: Styles for the Resource Manager

group.title: RM Marketplace
group.description: Styles for the [XFA] RM Marketplace Addon

group.title: Nulumia Helper Settings
group.description: Developer settings for Nulumia themes

property.title: Profile fields popup text
property.description: The color of the profile fields text

property.title: Item arrow, inner (Deprecated)
Item arrow, outer (Deprecated)
Indicator Type
New Indicator Label
property.description: Styles the new node indicator if enabled.

property.title: Badge
property.description: Badges appear to indicate a number if items requiring attention, such as unread messages in your inbox

property.title: Badge - highlighted
property.description: Highlighted badges grab the viewer's attention more and tend to indicate new items to be reviewed

property.title: BB code blocks - title
property.description: Styles the title section of BB code blocks within messages

property.title: Block border framework
property.description: Virtually all blocks have their borders styled with these settings

property.title: Block border radius
property.description: Controls the size of the curve on block border corners

property.title: Block filter bar
property.description: When the content of a block can be filtered, the controls to do so are styled here

property.title: Block footer
property.description: When information needs to be conveyed in a footer element for a block, its style is controlled here

property.title: Block footer height (optional)
property.description: Used optionally to assign a fixed height to block footers. Can be referenced via CSS

property.title: Block header
property.description: Blocks often have title bars at their tops, which are styled here

property.title: Block link
property.description: Some links are displayed as small blocks such as choices in a popup menu, and their background will highlight when hovered

property.title: Block link - selected
property.description: Styling for block-type links when in their selected state

property.title: Block minor header
property.description: Sub-headings in blocks use these settings

property.title: Block minor tab header
property.description: Used for multi-part, tabbed sub-headings

property.title: Block minor tab header - selected tab
property.description: Selected tabs from block sub-headings

property.title: Block padding horizontal
property.description: The horizontal space between the edges of a block and its content

property.title: Block padding vertical
property.description: The vertical space between a block's content and its edges

property.title: Block tab header
property.description: Occasionally, blocks will have multi-part, tab headers, styled with these settings

property.title: Block tab header - selected tab
property.description: The selected tab in multi-part headers takes additional styling from here

property.title: Block text header
property.description: Text headers are used for subtle identification of content areas, without changing the background style or color

property.title: Border color
property.description: Structural borders around blocks of content generally use this color

property.title: Button base
property.description: Defines the styling for the basic elements that are common to all text-based buttons

property.title: Button - call to action
property.description: Call to action buttons sit alone and invite the user to do something, like post a new thread

property.title: Button - default
property.description: Most buttons use this styling, except for primary form submit buttons

property.title: Button - height
property.description: Enter a value for use when styling buttons with height & line-height, instead of padding. Note that you will need to enter this value within the extra LESS fields below.

property.title: Button padding - vertical
property.description: Enter a value for use when styling buttons with padding, instead of height & line-height. Note that you will need to enter this value within the extra LESS fields below.

property.title: Button - primary
property.description: These rules are used mostly for the main submit button for forms

property.title: Accented content area base
property.description: When attention needs to be directed to content, this background may be employed

property.title: Accented content background color
property.description: This background color is used for further differentiation from regular content

property.title: Alternate content background color
property.description: In order to differentiate it, some content will be presented on this alternative background

property.title: Content background color
property.description: Most normal content will sit on this background

property.title: Highlighted content background color
property.description: When the standard background color is highlighted or selected, it will use this color

property.title: General content padding
property.description: The global content padding value used for most content areas throughout the theme, such as widgets, blocks, messages, etc.

property.title: Data list header
property.description: The title bar of a data list is styled with these settings

property.title: Data list padding horizontal
property.description: Each row in a data list has this much horizontal padding

property.title: Data list padding vertical
property.description: Data list rows each have this much vertical padding

property.title: Product Rating Circle: Background Color
property.description: The background color for the product rating circle's bar.

property.title: Show product owner on overview list
Dragonbyte Tech Ecommerce
property.description: Check to improve theme compatibility with Dragonbyte Tech Ecommerce

property.title: Product widgets: description max length
property.description: Enter a value in characters to limit the length of the product widget description

property.title: Product widgets: description display
property.value_parameters: default=Inherit forum/node description display method (default) show=Show hide=Hide

property.title: Run Slick Image Sliders in no-conflict mode
property.description: Nulumia themes use Slick image slider for various features, such as Partner Icons and Featured Widgets. Check this option to run them in no-conflict mode if you have other plugins which use Slick Slider. This will prevent odd styling from occurring.

property.title: Editor button icon color
property.description: Color of the icons in the toolbar

property.title: Editor button icon disabled color
property.description: Color for icons that are disabled or unavailable

property.title: Editor button hover background
property.description: Color for button background when hovered

property.title: Editor button selected background
property.description: Color for button background when pressed and held, or when a sub-menu is active

property.title: Editor selection background
property.description: Background color for text that has been selected in the editor

property.title: Editor selection text color
property.description: When text is selected within the text editor, it will use this color

property.title: Editor toolbar background
property.description: Background for the toolbar when the editor is not focused

property.title: Element 1
property.description: Color for various button and selectable type element

property.title: Element spacer
property.description: This represents the base value for spacing between elements, such as individual blocks.

property.title: Fixed system message bar
property.description: Occasionally, system messages will be displayed to the visitor in a fixed element that appears at the bottom of the window. Its styling is controlled here

property.title: Body Text Font
property.description: This font is used for the text of messages etc.
property.value: "'Roboto', 'Open sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Fira Sans', 'Droid Sans', sans-serif"

property.title: Headings
property.description: Styles the h1 through h5 tags
property.value: "'Roboto', 'Open sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Fira Sans', 'Droid Sans', sans-serif"

property.title: User Interface Font
property.description: The font list for your main text
property.value: "'Roboto', 'Open sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Fira Sans', 'Droid Sans', sans-serif"

property.title: Form label column
property.description: In full-width forms, the left column contains labels for the controls in the right column

property.title: Form label column width
property.description: This should be expressed as a percentage.

property.title: Form submit row
property.description: At the bottom of most forms is a bar containing the submit button etc.

property.title: Global action indicator color
property.description: This is the base color of the gadgets that display when an action is being processed in the background.

property.title: Inline moderation bar
property.description: A bar containing controls appears when content is selected for inline moderation. Its appearance is controlled here

property.title: Inline moderation highlight color
property.description: When content is selected for inline moderation, its background color will be replaced with this

property.title: Form input
property.description: Controls the style of most text-input boxes

property.title: Form input - disabled
property.description: When text boxes are disabled, these rules are applied

property.title: Form input - focused
property.description: These rules are applied to text boxes when they are selected for input

property.title: Line height
property.description: This value controls the amount of spacing between lines of text

property.title: Link color
property.description: Basic hyperlinks on standard background colors will use this style

property.title: Links - hovered
property.description: When basic links are hovered, they use this set of rules for their styling

property.title: Link hover color
property.description: Basic hyperlinks will turn this color when hovered

property.title: Member profile header
property.description: The member profile page's content header is styled with these settings

property.title: Member profile header - name
property.description: The styling of the name of the member whose page is being viewed is controlled here

property.title: Member profile secondary header
property.description: Contains elements such as total messages, reactions, etc

property.title: Member tooltip header
property.description: The member tooltip, which appears when hovering over user names, is styled with these controls

property.title: Member tooltip header - name
property.description: Styling for the name of the user whose tooltip is being displayed

property.title: Member tooltip secondary header
property.description: Contains elements such as total messages, reactions, etc

property.title: Menu footer
property.description: When a popup menu has a bottom, footer element, it will use these settings

property.title: Menu header
property.description: Most menus identify themselves with a header just underneath their top border

property.title: Menu link row
property.description: Styling for link rows within popup menus

property.title: Menu link row (extended)
property.description: Additional styling for menu links

property.title: Menu link row - selected
property.description: Styling for link rows in menus, when selected or hovered

property.title: Menu tab header
property.description: Multi-part, tabbed menu headers use these settings

property.title: Menu tab header - selected tab
property.description: Controls the selected tab in multi-part menu headers

property.title: New message indicator
property.description: Usually a small token attached to the message block, the indicator that a message is new/unread is controlled here

property.title: Message user info block
property.description: Apart from its width, the (left) message user info column is styled here

property.title: Message user info block width
property.description: Controls the width of the (left) user info column on the full size message block

property.title: Meta theme color
property.description: This sets the theme color used for PWA installations, as well as the address bar color on Chrome for Android.

property.title: Account menu - header
property.description: Styles the header within the account popup menu

property.title: Account menu - links
property.description: Styles the menu links within the account popup menu

property.title: Logout link style
property.description: Change the appearance of the logout link in the user account menu

property.title: Show profile quickpost field
property.description: Check to show the profile quickpost field under the account menu links

property.title: Add pinterest save buttons to media
property.description: Check to add Pinterest save buttons to various media types. You may choose from supported media below.

property.title: Attachment image thumbnail
property.description: Styles attachment image thumbnails often found in messages, conversations etc

property.title: Avatar
property.description: Styling for the user avatar

property.title: Block container
property.description: Styles generic block type elements

property.title: Block footer - alternate
property.description:
Allows styling of an alternative block footer. Can be referenced via CSS using:
.xf-nlBlockFooterAlt();

property.title: Block head style
property.description: You can choose to globally enforce a block heading style, where default Xenforo uses the block-header and block-minorHeader styles in different places.
property.value_parameters: default=Default blockHeader=Always use block-header style blockMinorHeader=Always use block-minorHeader style

property.title: Block link - hover
property.description: Styles block links when hovered

property.title: Block minor tab header - hover tab
Block display style
property.description: By default, Xenforo blocks and widgets use inner padding between the block border and inner content. You may switch global block style to a non-padded "floating" style with no outer border. This will affect block type content theme-wide.

property.title: Block row
property.description: Styles block rows similar to structured item lists

property.title: Block wrapper
property.description: Styles the containing .block class wrapper around all block content types

property.title: [Body] Icon styling
property.value_parameters: default=Xenforo default custom=Custom (set via Style Properties on this page) brand=Brand colors

property.title: Has padded boxed nav
property.description: Override padding removal on boxed layout

property.title: -- Hide home label
property.description: Check to only display the FontAwesome icon instead of the text label

property.title: Show home icon
property.description: Check to display a FontAwesome home icon in the first breadcrumb item

property.title: Breadcrumb - active item
property.description: Styles the item for the page currently being viewed

property.title: Breadcrumb - first item
property.description: Styles the first item in the breadcrumb

property.title: Breadcrumb - item separator
property.description: Styles the separator icon between breadcrumb items

property.title: Item separator
property.description: Change the default separator icon between breadcrumb items

property.title: Button - large (l)
property.description: Styles buttons using the .button--l class

property.title: Button - link
property.description: Overrides styling for the button link class

property.title: Button - medium (m)
property.description: Styles buttons using the .button--m class

property.title: Button - small (s)
property.description: Styles buttons using the .button--s class

property.title: Ticker Speed
property.description: Enter a number for your ticker speed. Depending on the length of text in your ticker, you should experiment to find the ideal amount.

property.title: Floating caption animation
property.description: Choose an animation type for the caption area. If you specify a delay-between-items time below, elements within the caption such as title, description, and Read More button will use a staggered animation.
property.value_parameters: none=None (default) slideIn1=Slide in / Top to bottom slideIn2=Slide in / Left to right slideIn3=Slide in / Bottom to top slideIn4=Slide in / Right to left slideIn5=Slide in / Clockwise slideIn6=Slide in / Counter-clockwise slideIn7=Zoom in

property.title: Carousel default slide spacing
property.description: Set a value in pixels for spacing between carousel slides. This will not be used automatically - you must set your carousel sliders to use padded slides, which will use this value.

property.title: Collapse trigger icon
property.description: New! You can change the appearance of collapse trigger icons by entering here, using the format of "\xxx"

property.title: Collapse trigger - active icon
property.description: New! You may specify a different icon code here for the active collapse trigger

property.title: Collapse trigger - active
property.description: New! Change the behavior of toggled collapse trigger icons, or display a different icon code
property.value_parameters: rotate=Rotate 180deg flipX=Flip X flipY=Flip Y icon=Specify icon..

property.title: Colored button hover mode
property.description: Select the blend mode when hovering over colored button types, such as button--navy, button-indigo etc. Uses the native Xenforo xf-intensify or xf-diminish functions.

property.title: Sub-navigation position
property.description:
New since 2.2.2.2!
When using the Compact Header, you can move the sub-navigation alignment using this setting.

property.title: Compact header
property.description: Styles the compact header/navigation row, which contains both the logo and navigation links

property.title: Compact header - navigation tab - menu open
Compact header - logo
property.description: Styles the logo within the navigation row when Compact Header mode is enabled.

property.title: Compact header - text-based logo
property.description: Override styling for the text-based logo when the compact header option is enabled

property.title: Use custom HTML page wrapper
property.description:
Check to use an advanced Contact Us page template.
You can customize this page by editing Templates -> nl_contact_page_wrapper template.

property.title: Contact form type
property.value_parameters: default=Default (two-column layout) inline=Inline (labels above form fields)

property.title: Enter Branding Removal License Key
property.description:
Enter the Branding Free license key you received at www.nulumia.com. If you purchased a valid key, it will appear at:
www.nulumia.com/shop/my-downloads/

property.title: Use Copyright Removal Key
property.description: Disable copyright after purchasing a Branding Removal license

property.title: Single background image path
property.description:
This setting will override the default background, found in:
Style Properties -> Page setup -> Page background

property.title: Hide product short description
property.description: Check this option to hide the short product description.

property.title: Product Page: Slide Container
property.description: Style the container holding full size product images

property.title: Product Page: Product Thumbnails
property.description: Style product thumbnails below the main product image

property.title: Product Page: Slider Directional Controls
property.description: Style the arrow controls in the product image slider

property.title: Sidebar width
property.description: Set an optional width in pixels for the sidebar on product pages

property.title: DBTech ecommerce - product list - thumbnail wrapper
Product Page: Use Nulumia theme layout
property.description: Check to use a custom layout for product pages.

property.title: [DBTech Ecommerce] Product widget avatar size
property.value_parameters: xxs=XX Small (default) xs=X Small s=Small m=Medium l=Large

property.title: Product widgets: inner content padding
property.description: By default, uses the node row inner padding value. Enter a value in pixels to override this setting.

property.title: DBTech Ecommerce - product list - widget price
Product widgets: show Add to Cart button
Product icons: fixed height
property.description: If using the fixed size setting, you may enter a max height for product icons here in pixels.

property.title: Product icons: sizing
property.description: By default, product icon dimensions are set via Options -> DragonByte eCommerce. You can change this a fixed height setting, then enter a height in pixels.

property.title: Use alternating rows
property.description: Check this setting to use alternating row colors

property.title: Article/blog - date box
property.description: Styles date boxes usually found on article or blog listing items

property.title: Carousel direction controls width
property.description: Enter a width in pixels for direction arrow buttons found in carousel sliders

property.title: Allow list / grid toggle
property.description: Check to display a small list/grid toggle icon. This will allow the user to choose a preferred layout.

property.title: Cell padding
property.description: Override padding of inner content in thread grid items. A higher value will produce "fatter" grid items, while a smaller item will produce more compact items.

property.title: Container style
property.description: You thread grid can be placed in a container or float against the page background

property.title: Grid item max width
property.description: New in 2.2.1.5! Enter a value in pixels for the maximum width of items in the grid. This setting has no effect when using stretchable item widths.

property.title: Grid item min width
property.description: New in 2.2.1.5! Threads will never shrink below this value. Can be helpful when using more than two threads per row to ensure node contents remain well readable.

property.title: Max items per row
property.description:
Select a maximum limit for threads per row. Nodes will automatically stretch and fit up to this limit, based on the space available.
Recommended: 3

property.title: Discussion grid list - container style
property.description:
Styles the container around the grid of threads.
Targets the .structItemContainer element

property.title: Unlock Discussion Grid
property.description: Unlock discussion grid beta feature

property.title: Minimum required screen size
property.description: Enter a value in pixels for the minimum width to use the Discussion Grid. It is not recommended to use this feature on small mobile screens, such as smartphones.

property.title: Spacing between grid items
property.description: You may enter a value in pixels, or use Xenforo style property syntax.

property.title: Stretch grid items
property.description: Choose whether to stretch items to best fit, or remain in fixed widths

property.title: Dot control button
Article grid item: title position
property.description: You can choose to move the article grid item titles to inline position below the image, for a more traditional CMS item appearance.

property.title: Enable featured content slider
property.description:
Check to enable using the featured content slider. You may choose which positions to place your slider below.
Documentation & Guide

property.title: Enable Column #1
property.description:
You may add custom HTML, or Xenforo widgets using the Nulumia Footer Widget Locations addon.
Add widgets at Appearance -> Widgets

property.title: Enable Column #2
property.description:
You may add custom HTML, or Xenforo widgets using the Nulumia Footer Widget Locations addon.
Add widgets at Appearance -> Widgets

property.title: Enable Column #3
property.description:
You may add custom HTML, or Xenforo widgets using the Nulumia Footer Widget Locations addon.
Add widgets at Appearance -> Widgets

property.title: Enable Column #4
property.description:
You may add custom HTML, or Xenforo widgets using the Nulumia Footer Widget Locations addon.
Add widgets at Appearance -> Widgets

property.title: Enable Column E
property.description:
You may add custom HTML, or Xenforo widgets using the Nulumia Footer Widget Locations addon.
Add widgets at Appearance -> Widgets

property.title: Enable Footer Block Layout
property.description:
Check to enable the advanced footer block layout on your forum.
Documentation & Guide

property.title: Enable footer texture overlay
property.description: Check to add an overlay image to your footer area. Automatically disabled on mobile.

property.title: Add primary top row
property.description: Enables a single customizable row at the top of the footer

property.title: Enable Footer Upper Rows
property.description: Add a second row with two items. Places below the top row, and above the footer columns.

property.title: Background mode
property.description:
Check to override your theme's body background with a specified image or slideshow.
Documentation & Guide
property.value_parameters: default=Default (Style Properties -> Page setup -> Page background) custom=Single full image background slideshow=Slideshow background video=HTML5 Video (CURRENTLY INACTIVE)

property.title: Enable full width theme
property.description: Unlocks fixed width themes to take full screen space.

property.title: Enable Logo Icon Slider
property.description:
Check to enable the Logo Icon Slider on your forum
Documentation & Guide

property.title: Add custom logo subtitle
property.description: Check to add a subtitle motto underneath your logo. Example: "Your Place for Book Reviews", "Amazing Recipes & More!", etc.

property.title: Enable Slider
property.description:
Check to enable the slideshow feature on your forum
Documentation & Guide

property.title: Use text-based logo
property.description: Check to enable using a custom text logo, instead of the default .png image logo used in Xenforo. Note that you may deactivate this setting at anytime to return to your image logo.

property.title: Enable theme effects
property.description: Check to enable global effects related to your theme. Note that each theme may use different effects. These will likely be found in nl_effects.less

property.title: Use theme-styled browser scrollbars
property.description: Currently available for webkit browsers only (Chome, Opera, Android etc). Enabling this setting will NOT cause issues when users are not using compatible browsers.

property.title: Enable Ticker
property.description:
Enable the scrolling Ticker feature on your forum.
Documentation & Guide

property.title: Enable Top Bar
property.description: Show the top bar in your theme

property.title: Feature display order
property.description: Assigns the display order when other features are enabled, such as Slideshow, Icon Slider, and Featured Widgets

property.title: Always show to Administrators
property.description:
New since 2.2.3.0!
Admins will be able to view the carousel regardless of other settings

property.title: Auto Play
property.description: Check to auto play your icon slider by default

property.title: Auto play delay
property.description: Enter the number (in milliseconds) to add a delay between changing slides when auto play is enabled

property.title: Slider container
property.description: The slider container by default uses the Xenforo block content styling. You may override the styling here.

property.title: Slider directional controls
property.description:
Overrides styling for the arrow directional controls. By default, these are styled in:
Style Properties -> [Nulumia] UX Settings

property.title: Slider display mode
property.description: Check whether to display the slider in a block, or floating with transparent background

property.title: Full width row
property.description: Check to stretch the slider to the full width of the screen

property.title: Hide from Banned members
property.description:
New since 2.2.2.2!
Always hide from Banned members. This will override all other settings.
Priority: Highest

property.title: Hide from custom groups
property.description:
New since 2.2.2.2!
Enter the ID numbers of each usergroup, separated by commas.
Example: 7,12,17
Priority: High

property.title: Randomize slides
property.description: Check to randomize the order of slides on each page visit.

property.title: Slider row
property.description: Styles the outer section row which contains the featured content slider elements

property.title: Show to custom groups
property.description:
New since 2.2.2.2!
Enter the ID numbers of each usergroup, separated by commas.
Example: 7,12,17
Priority: Normal

property.title: Show to guests
property.description:
New since 2.2.2.2!
Show the featured content to visitors who are not logged in

property.title: Show to all Registered users
property.description:
If you want to only show the featured content to custom groups with a higher priority than registered users, you should disable this option and specify your custom groups below.
Examples: VIP Users, Premium Members, etc.

property.title: Number of slides to scroll
property.description: Enter the number of slides to scroll when clicking on the navigation controls. For example, scroll one image at a time, or by groups of three.

property.title: Slides start at
property.description: Choose to begin the order of slides starting from the left/first slide, or placing the first slide in the center

property.title: HTML title
property.description: You can enter advanced HTML content for the slider title here
property.value:
"

A place to connect

Welcome to the forums

property.description: Check to align your slider with the full width of the @content area. This will make sure your slider is not set inside the padding of the @content container.

property.description: Set the transition speed in milliseconds

property.description: Styles H3 title tags within the featured widgets

property.title: Featured widget spacing
property.description: Enter an amount in pixels for the spacing between widgets

property.title: Inline CSS
property.description: Add your own custom inline CSS for styling your widgets. You can also place JS inserts or other relevant code snippets needed for your widgets.

property.title: Floating text color
property.description: Adjusts the color of floating text against dark backgrounds

property.title: Floating text adjust classes
property.description: You can specify multiple element classes here to adjust against darker backgrounds. These values should take the form of CSS.

property.title: Adjust floating text on dark backgrounds
property.description: Check to override the color of floating text when custom background or slideshow modes are enabled. This can help brighten text when it is hard to read against darker custom backgrounds.

property.title: Footer Block Spacing
property.description: Enter a value in pixels to separate blocks and columns in your footer layout. Columns can also be styled individually by using the properties on the left.

property.title: Add logo to top of column
property.description: Check to automatically add your logo to the header of Column A

property.title: Use custom HTML
property.description: Check to display custom HTML which you may enter below. Uncheck to hide your custom content, which can be useful when only choosing to display Xenforo widgets within the column.

property.title: Set column width (optional)
property.description:
Enter a value in pixels (px) or percent (%) to manually set the column width.
Preferably, you should only set a custom width for 1-2 columns at a time.

property.description: Check to load the CSS Animate It library via CDN

property.title: [Jquery Library] Parallax.js
property.description: Check to load this feature. This library may or may not be used by your theme. If selected by default, it is recommended to leave this enabled.

property.title: [Jquery Library] Enable Particles.js
property.description: Check to load this feature via CDN delivery. This library may or may not be used by your theme. If selected by default, it is recommended to leave this enabled.

property.title: Custom inline Javascript (Deprecated)
property.description: This feature is deprecated and no longer in use. If you have leftover code in this section, please move the contents to [Nulumia] Theme Settings -> Script Insert - Below body.

property.title: Button
property.description: Override styling for submit buttons in the moderation bar

property.title: Inline notice styling
property.description: You can enter custom inline CSS here to style your notices

property.title: Theme License Key
property.description:
Enter your License Key for your purchase. You may find this by visiting:
www.nulumia.com/shop/my-downloads/

property.title: Logged-in visitor tab labels
property.description: Check to hide the visitor tab text labels (displays FontAwesome icons only)

property.title: Enable logo glitch effect
property.description: Check to enable a glitch effect when hovering over logo images

property.title: Pages to display
property.description: Check which page types you'd like to display your icon slider

property.title: Slider display mode
property.description: Check whether to display the slider in a block, or floating with transparent background

property.title: Feature display order
property.description: Assigns the display order when other features are enabled, such as Slideshow, Icon Slider, and Featured Widgets

property.title: Full width row
property.description: Check to stretch the slider to the full width of the screen

property.title: Location
property.description:
Custom insertion snippet:
<xf:if is="property('nlEnableIconSlider') == true">
<xf:include template="nl_slick_rotator" />
</xf:if>
property.value_parameters: belowNav=Above content, below navigation aboveFooter=Below content, above footer custom=Custom location

property.title: Logo max height
property.description: Enter a max height in px, percent or auto. Increasing this value will allow for larger logos. Note that using a smaller image than the value entered will not scale the image up; rather it will prevent larger images from exceeding this value.

property.title: Logo position
property.description: Change the logo position from left to center

property.title: Logo subtitle
property.description: Styles your logo subtitle text.

property.title: Add Modern Gamer footer bar
property.description: Check to add a content bar above the default Xenforo footer links & chooser bar

property.title: Enable header featured banner image (DEPRECATED)
property.description: ** This feature has been deprecated and will no longer function **. If you have used this feature in a previous version, please utilize the ad_header location of the Xenforo Advertisements system.

property.title: Theme heading overlay image
property.description: Enter the path for the theme's gradient overlay png image. This gives block and widget headings a glossy appearance. You may choose from block_head1.png - block_head5.png

property.title: Wrap messages in Modern Gamer frame
property.description: Check to use the 3D theme wrapper around messages, which includes the Post Tabs and bottom block footer

property.title: Move member tabs below profile header
Add menu link follow icons
property.description: Check to add some FontAwesome icons (usually a caret or angle) to menu link rows

property.title: Menu overlay wrapper
Action links
property.description: Styles the edit and moderation links below the message content

property.title: Message attribution balloon
property.description: Styles small extra details such as date, version, rating etc

property.title: User online indicator
property.description: Styling for the message avatar online indicator

property.title: Button style
property.value_parameters: buttonPrimary=Primary button buttonCta=CTA button buttonLink=Link button

property.title: Collapse / toggle user extra fields
property.description: Collapse the user extra info column by default for a more compact appearance. This group can be toggle expanded to reveal the fields.

property.title: Message content area
property.description: Styles the message container which holds the message text

property.title: User info block
property.description: Change the location of the user info block. By default, this is located to the left of the message body. You may also place it above in a row.

property.title: Message spacing
property.description: The amount in pixels to separate between messages

property.title: Message user info block - above
property.description: Styles the user info block when placed above the message

property.title: Message user details group
property.description: Styles the group containing the username, user title and user banners

property.title: Message user info group
property.description: Contains extra user info such as join date, reaction score, and custom fields

property.title: Avatar size
property.description: Set the user avatar size when the info block is placed above messages

property.title: Message username
property.description: Styles the message author username in the user info container

property.title: Message username - compact/responsive
property.description: Styles the message author username on mobile layouts

property.title: Message
property.description:
Styles message containers
Targets the .block--messages .message element

property.title: Message - mod selected
property.description: Styles message containers when selected for moderation

property.title: Center footer content on mobile
property.description: Check to center your footer content on mobile devices

property.title: Navigation icon size adjuster
property.description: Enter a value in pixels for controlling the size of FontAwesome icons within navigation and visitor tabs. Leave blank to use the default navigation tab font size.

property.title: Location
property.description: You can move the navigation above or below the header.

property.title: Max width
property.description: On smaller devices, the Xenforo navigation compacts to show a small logo next to your visitor navigation links. You may control the width of this logo here. Can be helpful in balancing the space taken by your logo in relation to the visitor links.

property.title: Use alternating row styling
property.description: Check to use alternating row colors for your node listing. You can set the colors below.

property.title: Node category container
property.description:
Styles the inner category group container
Targets .block-container

property.title: Node row list container
property.description:
Styles the inner container around node rows
Targets .block-body

property.title: Node cell
property.description: Styles the inner cells of node row containers

property.title: Collapse toggle - opened
property.description: Enter the Font Awesome unicode value for the toggle-opened icon

property.title: Minimum screen size for grid layout
property.description: Enter a value in pixels for the minimum width to use Side by Side Nodes. It is not recommended to use this feature on small mobile screens, such as smartphones.

property.title: Node max width
property.description: Enter a value in pixels for the maximum width of items in the grid. This setting has no effect when using stretchable item widths.

property.title: Node min width
property.description: Nodes will never shrink below this value. Can be helpful when using more than two nodes per row to ensure node contents remain well readable.

property.title: Max nodes per row
property.description: Select a maximum limit for nodes per row. Nodes will automatically stretch and fit up to this limit, based on the space available.

property.title: Iconify node stats
property.description: Check to use FontAwesome icons in place of the node stats labels

property.title: Node stats location
property.description: You can override the placement of the node stats while using the node grid layout.

property.title: Node group container
property.description:
Styles the container around groups of nodes or node categories
Targets .block--category

property.title: Icon block width
property.description: Recommended: 60-70px

property.title: Node icon size (width & height)
property.description: Enter a number in pixels (px) for the node icon. This is not a font-size for the icon, but rather the overall width and height of the icon and/or its outer border. The FontAwesome icon or image icon will be positioned in the center of this value.

property.title: -- Icon block - unread
property.description: Styles the icon span element around the icon

property.title: -- Last post inner group
property.description: Styles the group of last post items, such as avatar, title and author

property.title: Node list
property.description: Styles the overall wrapper around nodes and category groups on the forum list page

property.title: Node padding - horizontal
property.description: Horizontal inner padding of node rows (also affects padding of inner elements such as Node Title block, Last Post block, etc)

property.title: Node padding - vertical
property.description: Inner vertical padding of node rows

property.title: Node row
property.description: Styles the container of rows in the node list

property.title: Node row - alternate
property.description: Styles1 alternate (even) node rows when Use Alternate Node Rows option is enabled. (See [Nulumia] Node Settings property group.)

property.title: Iconify node stats
property.description: Check to use FontAwesome icons in place of the node stats labels

property.title: -- Stats label pair
property.description: Styles the pair of stat labels, such as Threads and Messages

property.title: Node stats location
property.value_parameters: default=Default belowDesc=Under description iconBlock=Floating icon block

property.title: Node title overflow
property.description: Choose whether long node titles will wrap to the next line, or limit with "..." ellipsis
property.value_parameters: default=Wrap to new line (default) ellipsis=Trim to single line with "..."

property.title: Last post block width
property.description: Default: 280px

property.title: Show Font Awesome icon column
property.description: Check to show a column next to notices with a Font Awesome icon

property.title: Notice - content base
property.description: Styles the main notice panel

property.title: Font Awesome icon
property.description: Enter the full icon code for your Font Awesome icon

property.title: Notice - icon column base
property.description: Set default settings for the notice icon column

property.title: NulumiaBase Framework Version
property.description: Indicates the current version of the NulumiaBase Framework powering your theme. Useful for checking updates and available feature releases. Please visit www.nulumia.com/nulumiabase-framework/ for more details on the latest version.

property.title: Override: Copyright below footer links
property.description:
Override normal placement of the copyright and insert directly below the footer links
Required by Aftermath

property.title: Nav inner adjuster
property.description: Helper: Deprecate if navPadded function is preferred

property.title: Has padded nav
property.description: Helper: Theme has contained/padded navigation. Used to bypass pageInset removal.

property.title: Page body - inner
property.description: Styles the main body content container

property.title: Page body inner - floating
property.description: Styles the main page content container when Floating Content mode is enabled

property.title: Page header row
property.description: Styles the dedicated Page Header row when the option is enabled. Note that your page title and breadcrumb elements may display differently within this area.

property.title: Background image vertical attachment
property.description: Select the vertical attachment for backgrounds images behind the page header row. Works with both Style Property assigned images and Parallax.JS background mode.

property.title: -- Content groups
property.description: Styles groups of content which display on certain pages, such as Resources

property.title: Hide on forum list
property.description: Check to hide the page header row on the forum list. Useful when displaying other features placed at the top of the body area.

property.title: Hide meta (author, date, tags)
property.description: Check this to hide the page meta info within the page header row

property.title: Hide on XenPorta 2 article list
property.description: Check to hide the page header row on the XenPorta 2 article list. Useful when using XenPorta as a homepage to prioritize displaying the articles.

property.title: Add Particles.js effect
property.description: Check to add the Particles.js effect behind your page header row. You must enable the feature first via the [Nulumia] Theme Effects & Animation property group.

property.title: -- Title
property.description: Styles the page title within the page header

property.title: Use parallax smooth scrolling background
property.description: Check to enable a smooth scrolling background image. Requires Parallax JS feature to be enabled in [Nulumia] Theme Effects & Animation property group.

property.title: Page title & breadcrumb
property.description: Choose where to place your page heading sections
property.value_parameters: welcome=Page Header Row: Place in a new row below the main navigation aside=Xenforo 1 Layout: Next to sidebar default=Xenforo 2 Layout: Full width above content

property.title: Minimum page width
property.description: Set a minimum page width for when the window size is in within the full width rules

property.title: Theme background toggle
property.description: When using Particles.js as your theme background, you may specify whether to keep your theme's background or make it transparent behind the particles.
property.value_parameters: default=Visible behind particles transparent=Transparent (only show particles)

property.title: Path to custom configuration file
property.description: If enabled, you may specify your custom configuration path here

property.title: Use custom configuration file
property.description:
Check to specify a custom configuration file. You may then choose where your file is hosted. If left blank, the default file will be used, which is found in your theme folder at:
styles/styleName/xenforo/assets/

property.title: Show save count
property.description: Choose whether to show the save count of each pin image
property.value_parameters: none=Not shown above=Above the button side=Beside the button

property.title: Button size
property.description: You can preview all button options at the following Pinterest Widget Builder: https://developers.pinterest.com/tools/widget-builder/

property.title: - Primary logo span
property.description: Styles for the first word(s) of your logo

property.title: Logo Text
property.description: This is the primary text for your logo.

property.title: Header/logo row inner content
property.description: Target: .p-header-content

property.title: Navigation row - responsive
property.description: Used to override styling of the navigation row on mobile devices

property.title: Navigation row - responsive link & icon
property.description: Styles items in the responsive navigation, such as the menu icon trigger, text logo and visitor tabs

property.title: Navigation row - sticky
property.description: Styles the navigation row when sticky mode is activated

property.title: Sub navigation row - sticky
property.description: Styles the sub navigation when sticky mode is activated

property.title: Avatar column width
property.description: Control the scaling of the quick reply's avatar column
property.value_parameters: default=Standard (same width as message user info column) compact=Compact

property.title: Item cost balloon style
property.description: Choose the style for the item cost balloon. Uses the standard Highlight and Accent content styles as configured in the Basic Colors property group.

property.title: Grid item price
Rating circle bar color
property.description: Set the color for the circle rating bar

property.title: Rating circle bar width
property.description: Set a width in pixels for the circle bar

property.title: Rating circle track color
property.description: Background color of the circle track

property.title: Rating circle width
property.description: Sets the width of circle rating bars within sidebar widgets

property.title: Scroll to Top button - bottom distance
property.description: Enter an amount in pixels to set the distance between the Scroll to Top button from the bottom of the page.

property.title: Browser Scrollbar - Thumb
property.description: Styles the handle of the browser scrollbar

property.title: Browser Scrollbar - Thumb Hover
property.description: Styles the scrollbar handle on mouseover

property.title: Browser Scrollbar - Track
property.description: Style for the browser scrollbar track piece

property.title: Logo Text - Secondary (Optional)
property.description: Optional text if you would like to separate your logo into two <span> elements. Useful when using two different fonts or colors for each word.

property.title: Sub-navigation mode
property.description: Check to disable the sub navigation links row, under the main navigation. Instead, sub-navigation links will be moved back to the parent tab's dropdown menu.
property.value_parameters: default=Display in sub-navigation row (Xenforo default) dropdown=Display in dropdown menu / remove sub-navigation row

property.title: Separate node title & descriptions
property.description: Check this setting to move the node category below the title, into its own row.

property.title: Sharpen mini-logo on mobile navigation
property.description: Check to sharpen your logo when displayed in the compact mobile navigation. Useful if your logo image appears slightly blurry on small screens.

property.title: Add theme hook locations preview toggle
property.description: Check to add a toggle switch to the staff bar, which will show all available theme hooks on the viewed page. Although this setting will work on the front-end for admins, you should still disable this option once you are finished.

property.title: Sidebar block
property.description: Styles sidebar block and widget containers

property.title: Content row
property.description: Styling for itemized rows within sidebar blocks

property.title: Category accordion list start behavior
property.description: Choose whether accordion type menu lists should start closed or open at page load.

property.title: Hide prefixes
property.description: Hide prefixes from content titles, such as in Latest Posts, Threads, etc. Can be helpful in achieving a more clutter-free sidebar.

property.title: Links
property.description: Styling for links within the sidebar

property.title: Use alternating row colors
property.description: Check this setting to use alternating row colors for sidebar widgets that use row-based content listings

property.title: [Siropu] Ads manager compatibility
property.description: Check to add style compatibility with Siropu Ads manager

property.value_parameters: default=Use default slider setting bottom=Bottom left=Left floating right=Right floating

property.title: Menu header display
property.description: Choose between showing the "Menu" label, or a small logo image in the header of the slide out menu.

property.title: - 1st level item
property.description: Styles first-level sub links within the slide out menu

property.title: -- 2nd level item
property.description: Styles first-level sub links within the slide out menu

property.title: Arrow control offset
property.description: Controls the offset of the arrow controls from the edge of the slider. Use a negative value to move the arrows outside the slide container.

property.title: Auto play
property.description: Check to auto play your icon slider by default

property.title: Auto play delay
property.description: Enter the number (in milliseconds) to add a delay between changing slides when auto play is enabled

property.title: Bottom controls container - inner
Delay between items
property.description: Enter a value in seconds for the delay between inner items within the caption, when using an animation type. For example, using a delay will stagger the slide-in animations between the slide title, description, and Read More button.

property.title: Animation offset
property.description: Controls the distance which items slide in when using the caption animation

property.title: Animation type
property.value_parameters: linear=Linear ease=Ease (default) ease-in=Ease in ease-out=Ease out

property.title: Mobile caption box (moved below slide)
property.description: When using the setting to move the caption below the slide on mobile devices, you can override caption box styling here

property.title: Default caption position
property.description: Set the default position for the slider captions. You can manually set the caption for each individual slide below, or leave them to use this default setting.
property.value_parameters: bottom=Bottom (default) left=Left floating right=Right floating leftAside=Left aside rightAside=Right aside

property.title: Floating caption content spacing
property.description: Enter a value in pixels for the vertical spacing between HTML elements within your caption description. Affects items such as paragraphs, buttons, lists, etc.

property.title: Floating caption offset
property.description: Controls the distance from the edge of the slider when using the Floating left/right positions

property.title: Inline custom CSS
property.description: You can place any additional inline CSS here to style your slider or content.

property.title: Custom location snippet
property.description:
Copy and paste this code into your templates to display the slider in a custom location
Do not edit

property.title: Feature display order
property.description: Assigns the display order when other features are enabled, such as Slideshow, Icon Slider, and Featured Widgets

property.title: Enable on mobile devices
property.description: Controls whether your slide loads on tablets and smartphones. Setting this feature to off will prevent slide images from loading and save on user bandwidth.

property.title: Hide from Banned members
property.description:
Always hide from Banned members. This will override all other settings.
Priority: Highest

property.title: Hide from custom groups
property.description:
Enter the ID numbers of each usergroup, separated by commas.
Example: 7,12,17
Priority: High

property.title: Slider max height
property.description: Enter a value in pixels to set the maximum height your slider can take on the page. Helpful when using full-width slider with very large images. This setting is ignored on table and mobile sizes to prevent clipping of caption boxes.

property.title: Mobile caption location
property.value_parameters: overlay=Stay as overlay below=Move below image (default)

property.title: Show to custom groups
property.description:
Enter the ID numbers of each usergroup, separated by commas.
Example: 7,12,17
Priority: Normal

property.title: Show to all Registered users
property.description:
If you want to only show the slider to custom groups with a higher priority than registered users, you should disable this option and specify your custom groups below.
Examples: VIP Users, Premium Members, Subscribers, etc.

property.title: Pages with sidebars layout
property.description: Choose where you'd like to display your slider on pages that use sidebars
property.value_parameters: wide=Full width above sidebar narrow=Narrow width next to sidebar

property.title: Transition speed
property.description: Set the transition speed in milliseconds

property.title: FontAwesome icon code #1
property.description:
Enter the icon code for a custom FontAwesome icon which isn't provided in the above options. For example your code should be in the following format:
<i class="fab fa-pinterest"></i>

property.title: PNG icon path #1
property.description: Add a custom png image icon when it is not available from FontAwesome. Transparent png format is recommended in size matching the value above for property "Social icon button size".

property.title: Link
property.description: Link to your social media profile

property.title: Social icon button size
property.description: Enter a value in pixels for social icons within the body and footer. Social icons within the top bar are sized separately.

property.title: Show social links
property.description: Add a group of your social media profile icons to the top bar
