property.title: Tooltip default text:
property.description: Enter the text to display in your tooltip. The social media site names as entered below will be added to the end of the phrase.

property.title: [SEO] Use rel="me" tag on social links
property.description: Check to use rel="me" tags on your outbound social links.

property.title: [SEO] Use rel="nofollow" tags on social links (Recommended)
property.description: Check to place rel="nofollow" tags in your outbound social media links. This helps to keep your site's SEO value contained at your URL.

property.title: Show "Follow Us" tooltips on icon hover
User banner - staff
property.description: Customize the styling of the staff banner in message layouts

property.title: -- Full width inner contents
property.description: Check to also stretch the inner contents of header areas

property.title: - Full width navigation
property.description: Stretch the navigation to the full width of your screen. Leaving this un-checked will use the normal body width set for your theme.

property.title: Discussion row - alternate
property.description: Styles structured item list rows when Alternating Color mode is enabled.

property.title: Use alternating row styling
property.description: Check to use alternating row colors for your node listing. You can set the colors below.

property.title: Discussion row cell
property.description: Styles the inner cells of discussion rows

property.title: -- Stats inner group
property.description: Styles the group of views and replies

property.title: Use hover row styling
property.description: Check to style discussion rows when hovered

property.title: -- Latest inner group
property.description: Styles the group of last post items, such as avatar, title and author

property.title: Discussion row - new indicator label (status group)
New posts indicator
property.description: Display an indicator for new posts in the discussion/thread list.
property.value_parameters: none=None labelThreadStatus=New label (thread status group) labelThreadTitle=New label (end of thread title) dot=Dot (end of thread title)

property.title: Status icon color
property.description: Change the color of status icons for threads, such as Stickied, Watched, etc

property.title: Title overflow
property.description: Choose whether long node titles will wrap to the next line, or limit with "..." ellipsis
property.value_parameters: default=Wrap to new line (default) ellipsis=Trim to single line with "..."

property.title: Style Version
property.description: Indicates the version number of your installed theme. Useful for checking against the latest version available and tracking feature releases. Please visit the latest info on your style at www.nulumia.com or by searching via www.xenforo.com.

property.title: Text-based logo
property.description: Styles for the text based logo. May override this setting by entering CSS values below to each span individually.

property.title: Theme body class
property.description: Adds extra class to <body> for per-theme CSS targeting

property.title: Body ticker: add title
property.description: Check to place a title in the ticker block

property.title: Body ticker container
property.description:
Styles the container of the ticker when placed in the body content.
Uses the block-container style by default

property.title: Feature display order
property.description: Assigns the display order when other features are enabled, such as Slideshow, Icon Slider, and Featured Widgets

property.title: Hide from Banned members
property.description: Always hide from Banned members. This will override all other settings.

property.title: Hide from custom groups
property.description:
Enter the ID numbers of each usergroup, separated by commas.
Example: 7,12,17
Priority: 2

property.title: Hide on device:
property.description: Choose the type or size of device on which you'd like to hide the ticker.
property.value_parameters: all=Show on all devices tablet=Hide on tablet or smaller mobile=Hide on mobile

property.title: Top bar ticker Item
property.description: Styles the ticker line items

property.title: Top bar ticker item separator
property.description: Styles for the separator icon between ticker lines (by default, uses FontAwesome)

property.title: Ticker Line 1
property.description: Enter at least one ticker line
property.value: "This is a scrolling ticker line using pure CSS and HTML! This ticker system comes included as part of all Nulumia themes."

property.title: Ticker Line 2
property.value: "You can customize these lines in your admin panel, works purely off Style Properties!"

property.title: Ticker Line 3
property.value: "You can even add links, and other HTML markup! Responsive and customizable."

property.title: Location
property.description:
Custom insertion snippet:
<xf:if is="property('nlEnableIconSlider') == true">
<xf:macro template="nl_ticker_macros" name="ticker" arg-location="body" />
</xf:if>
property.value_parameters: topbar=Top bar belowNav=Above content, below navigation aboveFooter=Below content, above footer custom=Custom location

property.title: Pages to display
property.description: Check which page types you'd like to display the ticker

property.title: Show to custom groups
property.description:
Enter the ID numbers of each usergroup, separated by commas.
Example: 7,12,17
Priority: 1

property.title: Show to all Registered users
property.description:
If you want to only show the ticker to custom groups with a higher priority than registered users, you should disable this option and specify your custom groups below.
Examples: VIP Users, Premium Members, Subscribers, etc.

property.title: Sidebar page location
property.description: Check which location you'd like to place your ticker on pages with sidebars
property.value_parameters: wide=Full width narrow=Next to sidebar, narrow width

property.title: Body ticker title
property.description: Styles the HTML title of the ticker

property.title: Title
property.description: You may use HTML

property.title: Tooltip menu content
property.description: Styles popup tooltip menu containers

property.title: Top bar inner content height
property.description: Enter a value in pixels for general height for content within the top bar. Helps automatically to keep items neat and equal height.

property.title: Top bar link
property.description: Styles links, buttons, and icon based links in the top bar. Note that social icons will inherit these styles if not explicitly given styling in the [Nulumia] Social Settings group.

property.title: Move staff and top bar above page
property.description: This setting only applies when the Stretch Header setting is enabled

property.title: Hide below size
property.value_parameters: none=Always show tablet=Tablet / medium devices mobile=Mobile / small devices

property.title: Date position
property.value_parameters: farLeft=Far left left=Left centerLeft=Center left center=Center centerRight= Center right right=Right farRight=Far right

property.title: Top bar group
property.description: Styles groupings of items such as date, ticker, html blocks etc

property.title: Hide below size
property.value_parameters: none=Always show tablet=Tablet / medium devices mobile=Mobile / small devices

property.title: HTML position
property.value_parameters: none=- none - farLeft=Far left left=Left centerLeft=Center left center=Center centerRight= Center right right=Right farRight=Far right

property.title: Hide below size
property.value_parameters: none=Always show tablet=Tablet / medium devices mobile=Mobile / small devices

property.title: HTML position
property.value_parameters: none=- none - farLeft=Far left left=Left centerLeft=Center left center=Center centerRight= Center right right=Right farRight=Far right

property.title: Top bar item
property.description: Styles general elements in the top bar, such as spans, list items, div tags etc.

property.title: Show date
property.description: Add a date / time field to the top bar

property.title: Show custom HTML block
property.description: Add custom HTML to the top bar. You may enter your markup in the field below.

property.title: Show custom HTML block
property.description: Add custom HTML to the top bar. You may enter your markup in the field below.

property.title: Show ticker
property.description: Add the ticker to your top bar. You can adjust the ticker settings in the [Nulumia] Ticker Settings property group.

property.title: [Top bar] Icon styling
property.value_parameters: default=Xenforo default custom=Custom (set via Style Properties on this page) brand=Brand colors

property.title: Hide below size
property.value_parameters: none=Always show tablet=Tablet / medium devices mobile=Mobile / small devices

property.title: Social links position
property.value_parameters: farLeft=Far left left=Left centerLeft=Center left center=Center centerRight= Center right right=Right farRight=Far right

property.title: Hide below size
property.value_parameters: none=Always show tablet=Tablet / medium devices mobile=Mobile / small devices

property.title: Ticker position
property.value_parameters: centerLeft=Center left center=Center centerRight= Center right

property.title: Use block-style page title
property.description: Check to wrap the page title in a block style container. This option does not apply when the Page Header Row option is in use.

property.title: Use combined navigation & sub-navigation rows
property.description: New since version 2.2.2.1! Combine the navigation & sub-navigation rows into one element. This can be useful to apply a shared background style between both rows.

property.title: Enable compact header (logo + nav)
property.description: Check this mode to use a single row, compact header layout. The logo will be placed in the same row as the navigation. Note that this mode will remove the large logo and ad:header row.

property.title: Show compact header for
property.description:
New since 2.2.2.1!
Choose which visitors can see the compact header. In other cases, the default Xenforo header will appear.
property.value_parameters: all=All visitors logged=Logged-in visitors unlogged=Logged-out visitors

property.title: Add drop shadows to block-based content areas
Use custom drop shadows
property.description: By default, popups, tooltips and menus use the same drop shadow settings as content elements. Check this option to specify a different drop shadow for popup elements.

property.title: Enable discussion / thread grid
property.description: Change the discussion / thread list into a grid layout

property.title: Enable node grid layout
property.description:
Enable the node grid layout on your forum list.
Documentation & Guide

property.title: -- Enable grid for sub forums
property.description: Check to also apply the node grid to sub forums (within the forum_view template)

property.title: Use hover transitions
property.description: Adds a subtle mouse-over transition to various elements throughout your theme, such as links, buttons, background colors etc.

property.title: Node icon type
property.description: Set which method to use for node icons. Default will use the basic Font Awesome icons in Xenforo, and is best for compatibility with third party addons. Custom allows you to set icons for each type of node (forum, page, link etc), but limits compatibility
property.value_parameters: default=Default fa=Custom Font Awesome icons img=Image Sprites (Xenforo 1 style)

property.title: Enable custom node backgrounds
property.description:
Enable using image backgrounds for your forum nodes.
Documentation & Guide

property.title: Add drop shadows to popup elements
property.description: Add drop shadows to popup elements, such as tooltips, menus, and overlays

property.title: Use XF1 style breadcrumb
property.description: Check to add arrow-framed style to breadcrumb items

property.title: User banner - base
property.description: Define basic styling for all user banners in the user info column

property.title: Visitor tab - alert balloon
property.description: Styles the small numbered alert balloons above visitor tabs

property.title: Visitor tabs location
property.description: Does not work while using the compact header layout.
property.value_parameters: default=Default (Navigation) logoBlock=Logo row area topbar=Top bar

property.title: ---- Visitor (avatar only) tab
property.description: Styling for the visitor avatar tab when the username label is hidden

property.title: XF1 Breadcrumb container
property.description: This settings should typically mimic the standard XF2 container element, specifically block-container, using the main content background color, content text, and border style. These are used to style the items and arrows.

property.title: XF1 Breadcrumb - active item
property.description: Styles the item for the page currently being viewed

property.title: XF1 Breadcrumb - first item
property.description: Styles the first item in the breadcrumb

property.title: Gallery list item description
property.value_parameters: default=Hover - slide (default) fade=Hover - fade in (BETA feature) below=Below item (always show)

property.title: Hide filter bar
property.description: Check to hide the filter bar on all XFMG pages. Useful to produce a cleaner layout with less onscreen elements.

property.title: Hide moderation and watch links
property.description: Check to hide the moderation, mark viewed and watch links. useful to produce a cleaner layout with less onscreen elements.

property.title: Hide sidebar
property.description: Check to hide the sidebar on all XFMG pages. Useful to produce wide full-width layouts while retaining your widget setup within Appearance -> Widgets.

property.title: XFMG - Item description below - content
property.description: Styles the media item description when set to the Below Item location

property.title: XFMG - Item description below - title
property.description: Styles the media item title when set to the Below Item location

property.title: Item description
property.description: Choose between displaying item description text within the default expandable block, or regular paragraph text.
property.value_parameters: expand=Expandable quote block (default) regular=Full regular text

property.title: Xenporta article item - inline title
property.description: Styles the article item title when using inline style, instead of overlay

property.title: Description display style
property.description: You can override the placement of the node description while using the node grid layout

property.title: Read node icon color
property.description: When the content within a node has been read, its icon will revert to a less attention-grabbing color, defined here

property.title: Unread node icon color
property.description: Node icons give an at-a-glance indication of whether or not the content housed within the node has been read. The unread icon color should stand out from its background for quick identification

property.title: Sub-forums display style
property.description: Choose the style in which sub-forums will be displayed within a particular node element, according to the amount of space you want them to occupy

property.title: Separator (with label) - normal threads
property.description: You may override styling for the Normal Threads separator row

property.title: Overlay header
property.description: Overlays use a header element to identify their contents, styled here

property.title: Overlay mask color
property.description: When an overlay is shown, the page behind is masked by the color defined here. Use RGBA transparency to allow the page to show through

property.title: Page background
property.description: The page background, behind all block elements, uses the styling rules defined here

property.title: Page background color
property.description: The background of the page itself, on which all other content rests

property.title: Page edge spacer
property.description: All elements will be spaced at least this far from the edges of the page

property.title: Maximum page width
property.description: As the window is resized, it will continue to grow in width until this value, after which it will remain static

property.title: Progress bar color
property.description: The progress bar appears at the top of the window when the system is waiting for a response from the server

property.title: Footer
property.description: The footer is the primary element that sits below the main content on all public pages

property.title: Footer links
property.description: Controls styling for individual links within the footer

property.title: Header/logo row
property.description: The header row contains your logo and sits at the top of every public page

property.title: Small logo height
property.description: If you specify the height of your logo here, you can avoid a costly re-flow of your page layout once the logo loads.

property.title: Small logo width
property.description: If you specify the width of your logo here, you can avoid a costly re-flow of your page layout once the logo loads.

property.title: Logo URL
property.description: The web path from your site's XenForo installation directory to your logo image. If you specify an SVG image here, you should set Emails > Email logo URL to point to a PNG image, or similar, for increased compatibility.

property.title: Small logo URL
property.description: Path to the small logo image which will display in the compact header / navigation layout, and on mobile display

property.title: Navigation row
property.description: The navigation row sits below the header and contains the primary site navigation tabs and menus

property.title: Navigation padding horizontal
property.description: Defines the amount of padding applied horizontally to each main navigational tab in the header

property.title: Navigation padding vertical
property.description: This value defines the amount of padding applied to the main navigational tabs in the header

property.title: Navigation row - selected tab
property.description: Additional styling to apply to navigation tabs when they are selected

property.title: Navigation row - tab
property.description: Controls the styling of individual tab elements within the navigation row

property.title: Navigation row - hovered tab
property.description: Additional styling to apply to navigation tabs when the pointer hovers over them

property.title: Navigation row - menu open
property.description: Styling applied when the popup menu for the current tab is visible

property.title: Staff tools bar
property.description: Visible only to staff, the staff tools bar sits above the header and contains items such as reported content, the moderation queue...

property.title: Sub-navigation row
property.description: Below the main navigation row, this row shows content associated with the selected main navigation tab

property.title: Sub-navigation row - hovered element
property.description: Additional styling applied to sub-navigation tabs when the pointer hovers over them

property.title: Sub-navigation row - menu-open element
property.description: Styles sub-navigation elements whose popup menu is currently open

property.title: Wide responsive break point
property.description: The page will use the 'wide' styling rules if its width is below this value, and the 'full' rules if the width exceeds it

property.title: Sidebar and side navigation spacer
property.description: Distance between the main content and the sidebar

property.title: Sidebar and side navigation width
property.description: Width of any elements that make up the sidebar

property.title: Standalone tabs
property.description: Tabs that are not part of block headers are styled here

property.title: Standalone tabs - selected tab
property.description: The selected tab in groups that are not part of block headers

property.title: Empty rating star color
property.description: This is the color of the empty portion of each rating star.

property.title: Full rating star color
property.description: This is the color of the full portion of each rating star.

property.title: Style type
property.description: This defines the general type of style in use based on whether the content is placed on a light or dark background. This may change how colors are selected in certain scenarios.

property.title: Text color
property.description: Unless otherwise specified, text will be this color

property.title: Dimmed text color
property.description: Used when less-important text is placed next to normal text

property.title: Muted text color
property.description: Text is further de-emphasised using this style

property.title: Tooltip
property.description: Certain elements have special floating tooltips, which are controlled here

property.title: Style Folder Path
property.description: Enter the URL to your theme's folder. This property replicates the @imagePath property used in Xenforo 1.x. You may use this variable as shorthand to referring to theme images or other file types.
